category_sources: source_facts.description says WCSTools provides tools for using World Coordinate Systems in astronomical images.
source_facts.homepage points to the official Harvard WCSTools page.
display_name_sources: source_facts.description uses the WCSTools name and WCS astronomy context.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Harvard WCSTools documentation and distribution surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; the official Harvard WCSTools page provides documentation and distribution, but no official source-control repository was identified.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies WCS use in astronomical images.
source_facts.executables lists FITS and sky-coordinate utilities such as imwcs, sky2xy, and xy2sky.
